title: Mangalore, Karnataka — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Mangalore, Karnataka: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Mangalore is a city in Karnataka with a population of 650,000. A major port city in Karnataka, known for its beaches, coconut groves, and as a banking and IT hub.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
